input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.1.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: rule IC.1.1.4: The engine may be modified within the restrictions of the rules. IC.1.1.4 The engine may be modified within the restrictions of the rules.
